title: Nola Turns the Battle Chaotic
description: Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Luffy, Wyper, Enel, Zoro, Nami. Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Do you know who I am!!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sorry, I think I fell asleep...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It looks like you're in pain.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: TH- There's no way to defeat you!?

summary: Robin follows the historical trail through Upper Yard while the war around her threatens to bury the island’s forgotten truth.
